# PropFirm Knowledge

> All-in-one media platform for the forex and prop firm industry: AI-curated news, in-depth prop firm reviews, verified payouts, promo codes and trading education.

PropFirm Knowledge publishes daily forex news, fundamental analysis, prop firm reviews with trust scores, verified payout reports and active promo codes for prop trading firms.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Latest forex news, featured stories and editorial highlights.
- [About](/about): Mission, editorial standards and the team behind PropFirm Knowledge.
- [Prop Firms](/prop-firms): Directory of prop trading firms with reviews, trust scores and payout terms.
- [Payouts](/payouts): Verified prop firm payout reports — approved and rejected.
- [Promo Codes](/promo-codes): Active discount codes and coupons for prop firms.
- [Search](/search): Search articles, prop firm reviews and payout reports.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the editorial team.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we collect and protect personal data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of the site.
- [Disclaimer](/disclaimer): Risk and editorial disclaimer.
